message.content:
@startuml
title US007 - As Director, I want to associate a human resource (user) to a project

actor "Authenticated User" as user
participant ":System" as system

user -> system : 1 Asks to associate a human resource (user) to a project
user <-- system : 2 Search for the Data
user -> system : 3 Asks for Project List
user <-- system : 4 Shows Project List
user -> system : 5 Asks for System User List
user <-- system : 6 Shows System User List
user -> system : 7 Types data (email, projectCode, startDate, endDate, costPerHour, percentageOfAllocation)
user <-- system : 8 Shows Information Success

@enduml
